title: galium anglicum var. litigiosum
intro: Galium anglicum var. litigiosum, also known as the English bedstraw or Litigious bedstraw, is a variety of the Galium anglicum plant, which belongs to the bedstraw family (Rubiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Galium anglicum var. litigiosum can be prepared as an infusion or a tincture, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
